hero.label: Made for Domu Technology
hero.headline: I am driven to elevate debt collections with innovative AI solutions.
hero.subheadline: Domu Technology's approach to transform debt collections deeply resonates with my passion for tech and sales. I’m excited to contribute to a groundbreaking team that prioritizes empathy and efficiency in financial interactions.

whyCompany.title: Revolutionizing debt collections with AI is incredibly timely and impactful.
whyCompany.body: Domu Technology’s focus on leveraging generative AI for debt collection is groundbreaking. This innovative strategy not only streamlines processes for banks and insurers but also enhances customer engagement.

whyCompany.title: Startups thrive in high-growth environments and this is prime time.
whyCompany.body: As a Y Combinator-backed company, Domu is experiencing rapid growth within an evolving market. The chance to join as a founding SDR means contributing to a pivotal moment in the company’s trajectory.

whyCompany.title: My BDR background aligns perfectly with Domu's sales objectives.
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I honed my skills in outbound sales and client acquisition, leading to significant growth. My experience with B2B outreach and using tools like HubSpot equips me well for Domu’s ambitious sales targets.

quote: Joining Domu as a Founding SDR means being part of a team that’s reshaping the future of collections. I’m eager to be a driving force in this innovative journey.
